title: Why Girls Go Back Home
writer: Sonya Levien, Catherine Brody, Walter Morosco
actors: Patsy Ruth Miller, Clive Brook, Jane Winton
plot: Trusting country girl Marie Downey (Patsy Ruth Miller) falls in love with touring stage-actor Clifford Dudley (Clive Brook) and becomes a chorus girl as he becomes a matinée idol on old Broadway.
